title: helleborus × fissus
intro: Helleborus × fissus is a hybrid plant species in the genus Helleborus, commonly known as Christmas rose or hellebore. It is a flowering evergreen plant with nodding, bell-shaped flowers that grow in shades of white, pink, and purple, often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its potential to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, providing various health benefits. Hellebore preparations can be found in herbal supplements, teas, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other conditions.
